title: RICRE sample — Red River crossing / ferry custom (fictional demonstration IDs)
steps: Author creates AuthorResearchTarget { targetType: route, targetName: Red River crossing, linkedSceneIds: [scene_demo] }
AuthorResearchSource ingested with provenanceHash, rawExcerpt cap, ingestMethod author_url_fetch or manual_paste
CanonComparisonService compares claims to AuthorCanonKnowledgeRecord + Person/Place descriptions
ResearchContradictionDetectionService surfaces contradicts_canon rows for cockpit
CanonReconciliationService.applyAuthorDecision records AuthorCanonDecision and creates AuthorCanonKnowledgeRecord only after explicit accept / merge / divergence choice
loadAcceptedRicreCanonKnowledgeForScene injects RICRE_ACCEPTED_CANON lines into scene generation (subordinate to P2-E)

sampleResearchTarget.researchIntent: Ground ferry timing, toll custom, and sensory bank without overwriting genealogy.

sampleClaim.claimText: Crossing toll was often negotiated in goods rather than coin during lean seasons.

sampleCanonDecision.decisionReason: Matches oral-history layer already used in Book 1 room tone; keep as soft social texture only.
